curriculum.title: Multi-digit Addition and Subtraction
curriculum.summary: Fluent multi-step addition and subtraction in story and table settings.

curriculum.title: Multiplication and Division
curriculum.summary: Equal groups, arrays, missing factors, and inverse reasoning.

curriculum.title: Place Value and Rounding
curriculum.summary: Compare, compose, and round with hundreds and thousands.

curriculum.title: Fractions and Equal Parts
curriculum.summary: Unit fractions, equivalent visual shares, and fraction of a quantity.

curriculum.title: Measurement, Time, and Money
curriculum.summary: Clock, elapsed time, money totals, and unit reasoning.

curriculum.title: Perimeter and Area
curriculum.summary: Perimeter tracing, unit squares, and rectangle reasoning.

curriculum.title: Shapes and Angles
curriculum.summary: Classify polygons, angle turns, and symmetry clues.

curriculum.title: Patterns and Equations
curriculum.summary: Function machines, missing values, and growing patterns.

curriculum.title: Data and Graphs
curriculum.summary: Read tables, bar graphs, and picture graphs accurately.

curriculum.title: Logic and Elimination
curriculum.summary: Use clues, elimination, and parity-style reasoning.

curriculum.title: Coordinates and Paths
curriculum.summary: Read simple grids, paths, and movement rules.

curriculum.title: Solids and Nets
curriculum.summary: Cube views, hidden faces, and folding nets.
